skill.name: maxhub-zhihu
skill.description: 知乎/Zhihu平台知乎问答搜索、专栏文章与话题数据采集。当用户提到知乎、zhihu、问答、专栏、话题等相关需求时激活此Skill。
skill.summary: 知乎/Zhihu platform Q&A search, article collection, and topic data integration via MaxHub API gateway
skill.author: MaxHub Team

security_audit.summary: All 129 static findings are false positives. The skill is a legitimate Zhihu data integration tool that accesses public API endpoints via a configured MaxHub gateway. Environment variable access is limited to MAXHUB_API_KEY and MAXHUB_BASE_URL only. No file system access, no credential exfiltration, no command execution. High detection counts are due to API path documentation in markdown being incorrectly flagged as shell commands.

high_findings.title: Environment Variable Access for API Authentication
high_findings.description: Skill accesses MAXHUB_API_KEY and MAXHUB_BASE_URL environment variables. This is legitimate design for API gateway authentication, not a security vulnerability. The skill explicitly declares it does NOT access SSH keys, AWS credentials, or other sensitive environment variables.
high_findings.confidence_reasoning: Verified by reading SKILL.md metadata section - environment variable access is limited to required API credentials only, with explicit noAccess list for sensitive credentials.

high_findings.title: Network Access to External API
high_findings.description: Skill makes HTTPS requests to MaxHub API gateway (https://www.aconfig.cn). This is the intended behavior for a data integration skill. The security metadata explicitly limits network access to this single endpoint.
high_findings.confidence_reasoning: Confirmed by reading SKILL.md - network access is restricted to configured MaxHub gateway URL via HTTPS only.

medium_findings.title: API Path Documentation Flagged as External Commands
medium_findings.description: Static scanner flagged 94 occurrences of 'Ruby/shell backtick execution' in api-catalog.md, chain-patterns.md, and SKILL.md. These are documentation showing API paths like '/api/v1/zhihu/web/fetch_...' in markdown code blocks - NOT actual command execution. The backticks are Markdown syntax for code formatting.
medium_findings.confidence_reasoning: Verified by reading all flagged files - API paths are documentation strings in markdown, not executable code. No shell or Ruby commands are present.

low_findings.title: Heuristic Pattern Detection - High Entropy Files
low_findings.description: Static scanner flagged high entropy in SKILL.md and chain-patterns.md. This is due to mixed Chinese/English content, not encoded or encrypted payloads. No malicious content found.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Reviewed entire file contents - high entropy caused by multilingual documentation (Chinese/English), not binary or encrypted content.

low_findings.title: System Reconnaissance Flagged in Documentation
low_findings.description: Scanner flagged system reconnaissance in API catalog documentation. These are legitimate API endpoint descriptions, not reconnaissance operations.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Verified by reading api-catalog.md - all flagged lines are table rows describing API endpoints, not system commands or reconnaissance.

content.user_title: Search and collect Zhihu Q&A content
content.value_statement: Access Zhihu questions, articles, and topics through AI assistance. This skill enables intelligent search across Zhihu content with chain-based API calls for comprehensive data collection.
actual_capabilities: Search Zhihu questions, articles, videos, and user profiles by keyword
Collect user information including follower counts and published content
Fetch column articles, comments, and discussion threads
Access trending lists, recommendations, and topic networks
Chain multiple API calls for multi-step data analysis workflows
limitations: Requires MaxHub API key (not a free service - API calls are billed per use)
Cannot perform write operations (no posting, commenting, or liking)
Maximum 5 pages per query and 50 items per response to control costs

use_cases.title: Research Chinese market trends via Q&A analysis
use_cases.description: Analyze trending topics and expert answers on Zhihu to understand market sentiment in Chinese-speaking regions. Useful for market research and competitive analysis.

use_cases.title: Aggregate content for educational purposes
use_cases.description: Collect expert answers and articles on specific topics for educational content creation. Search for quality explanations and cite credible sources.

use_cases.title: Monitor brand reputation on Chinese platforms
use_cases.description: Track discussions and reviews about specific brands or products on Zhihu. Monitor sentiment trends and identify key influencers.

prompt_templates.title: Simple search query
prompt_templates.prompt: Search Zhihu for content about {topic} and show me the top 10 results

prompt_templates.title: User profile analysis
prompt_templates.prompt: Find the top 5 most influential Zhihu users who post about {topic}. Get their follower counts and recent article titles.

prompt_templates.title: Trending analysis
prompt_templates.prompt: What are the top 20 trending topics on Zhihu today? Group them by category and show the question count for each.

prompt_templates.title: Deep research workflow
prompt_templates.prompt: Search for Zhihu users who are experts in {field}. For each user found, get their article count, follower count, and top 3 articles. Then identify the most influential person in this field.

output_examples.output:
Found 50 articles on artificial intelligence. Top results include:

1. 'The Future of AI in Healthcare' - 2,340 upvotes, 89 comments
2. 'Understanding Machine Learning Basics' - 1,890 upvotes, 156 comments
3. 'AI Ethics and Responsible Development' - 1,560 upvotes, 203 comments

Showing first 10 of 50 results. Would you like to explore any specific article or search with different keywords?

output_examples.input: Find popular Zhihu creators in the education field
output_examples.output:
Top education influencers on Zhihu:

1. Zhang Wei - 850K followers, 423 articles, top topic: 'Online Learning'
2. Li Ming - 620K followers, 298 articles, top topic: 'College Admissions'
3. Wang Fang - 540K followers, 512 articles, top topic: 'Language Learning'

All three have verified accounts with high engagement rates. Would you like detailed analysis of any creator?

best_practices: Set MAXHUB_API_KEY environment variable before using the skill
Start with narrow search terms, then broaden if results are too few
Use chain workflows for multi-step research tasks to gather comprehensive data
anti_patterns: Do not attempt to post content or interact (write operations are blocked)
Avoid requesting thousands of results in one query - use pagination instead
Do not use for scrapingZhihu profiles at scale without considering rate limits

faq.question: Is this skill free to use?
faq.answer: No. The MaxHub API requires an API key and API calls are billed per request. Check MaxHub pricing for current rates.

faq.question: Can I post content or comment using this skill?
faq.answer: No. This skill only supports read operations (search, fetch, collect). Write operations are not supported.

faq.question: What is the rate limit for API calls?
faq.answer: Default limit is 60 calls per minute. Each query is limited to 5 pages with max 50 items per page.

faq.question: Does this skill store any data locally?
faq.answer: No. The skill does not access local file system. All data is fetched from API and returned directly to the user.

faq.question: Can I search for specific user profiles?
faq.answer: Yes. You can search users by keyword, get user details by URL token, and view their articles, followers, and following lists.

faq.question: How do I configure the MaxHub API key?
faq.answer: Set the MAXHUB_API_KEY and MAXHUB_BASE_URL environment variables in your Claude Code or AI assistant configuration before running the skill.
